zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel de Valence於大約1265年出生在英國時，她的父親William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke40歲，母親Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke36歲。她於1275年7月15日與John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1305年10月3日享年41歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾考文垂。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel de Valence于大约1265年出生在英国时，她的父亲William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke40岁，母亲Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke36岁。她于1275年7月15日与John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings在英国英格兰艾可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1305年10月3日享年41岁，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾考文垂。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Valence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Vallance
meanings: English and Scottish: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Valence in Drôme, France, named with Latin valentia ‘strength, capacity’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel de Valence was born about 1265, in England, her father, William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke, was 40 and her mother, Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke, was 36. She married John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings on 15 July 1275, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 3 October 1305, at the age of 41, and was buried in Coventry, Warwickshire, England.

fr.Of, Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, England: Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel de Valence est née environ 1265, à Angleterre, son père, William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings le 15 juillet 1275, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 octobre 1305, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Coventry, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel de Valence um 1265 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke 40 und ihre Mutter Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke 36. Sie hat am 15. Juli 1275 in Essex, England, United Kingdom John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Oktober 1305 im Alter von 41 Jahren und wurde in Coventry, Warwickshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Valence è nata il circa 1265 nel England, sua padre, William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings il 15 luglio 1275, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 3 ottobre 1305, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Coventry, Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel de Valenceが約1265年にイギリスで生まれた時，父William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembrokeは40歳，母Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembrokeは36歳であった。1275年7月15日にイギリスイギリスエセックスでJohn Hastings 1st Baron Hastingsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1305年10月3日に41歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアコベントリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel de Valence(이)가 대략 1265년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1275년 7월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1305년 10월 3일 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 커븐트리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Valence nasceu aproximadamente 1265, em Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings em 15 de julho de 1275, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de outubro de 1305, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Coventry, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Of, Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, England: Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel de Valence родилась около 1265 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings 15 июля 1275 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 3 октября 1305 г. в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности ковентри, варвиккшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel de Valence nació aproximadamente 1265, en Inglaterra, su papá, William de Valence 1st Earl of Pembroke, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Joan Munchensy Countess of Pembroke, tenía 36 años. Se casó con John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings el 15 de julio de 1275, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 3 de octubre de 1305, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Coventry, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
